case_number: criminal case and that CNIC No.43204-0498245-7

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-509 of 2024 Date of Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 07.10.2025. 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A. No.1739/2024. 3. For orders on maintainability of Main Case. Mr. Abdul Rehman A. Bhutto, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A.G., along with Insp. Muhammad Bashir, SHO PS Saeedabad, Keemari, Karachi, Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P.G. ------------------------ Petitioner Zameer Hussain Soomro has filed instant petition seeking directions for unblocking his bank account No.0024727000343103 maintained with HBL Kamber Branch with the title as Zameer Communication and removal of his CNIC Number from the criminal record, if any. Learned Counsel for the petitioner, inter alia, submits that the the petitioner has never remained involved in any criminal case and that CNIC No.43204-0498245-7 of the petitioner was blocked by the NADRA with reference to judgment dated 11.09.2023 passed by a Divisional Bench of this Court at Karachi in Special Criminal A.T.A No.142 of 2020, though the petitioner was not shown involved in the said case. Pursuant to the Court notices, the respondent No.1/ Manager, Habib Bank Ltd., Kamber Branch had filed his statement dated 23.01.2025, stating therein that the bank account of the petitioner was blocked by HBL Head Office, Karachi in compliance of order dated 02.10.2023 passed by this Court at Principal Seat at Karachi in Crl. A.T. Appeal No.133/2020 and letter dated 08.11.2023 issued by DIGP Counter Terrorism Department, Sindh. Comments have also been filed today by SHO PS Saeedabad Police Station, Keemari Karachi, mentioning that the petitioner is not involved in any case of PS Saeedabad.

Appeal No.133/2020 and letter dated 08.11.2023 issued by DIGP Counter Terrorism Department, Sindh. Comments have also been filed today by SHO PS Saeedabad Police Station, Keemari Karachi, mentioning that the petitioner is not involved in any case of PS Saeedabad. The learned Addl. A.G., as well as learned Addl. P.G. have recorded no objection if the petition is allowed. In view of the fact that the petitioner is neither shown absconder/proclaimed offender in any criminal case nor the official respondents have produced any criminal record against him, instant petition is allowed. Resultantly, the respondents are directed to unblock the CNIC of the petitioner bearing No.43204-0498245-7 as well as his account No.0024727000343103 maintained with HBL Kamber Branch with the title as Zameer Communication. Office is directed to send copy of the order to respondents for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE
